## Sobre este documento

Visao **cross-platform** dos parquets canonicos consolidados em
`data/unified/`. Diferente dos qmds per-source (`<plat>.qmd`) que descrevem
**uma** plataforma, aqui o foco eh **comparar** as plataformas — stacked
bars por source, distribuicao temporal cruzada, modelos cross, capture_method,
preservation global.

Setup do per-subset qmd define `SOURCES_FILTER` (vazio = todas; lista pra
subset tipo Web Chat / CLI / RAG).

```{python}
#| label: overview-totals

_rows = []
for table in ["conversations","messages","tool_events","branches",
              "sources","notes","outputs","guide_questions","source_guides",
              "project_metadata","project_docs"]:
    n = table_count(con, table)
    if n:
        _rows.append({"Tabela": f"{table}.parquet", "Rows": fmt_int(n)})
show_df(pd.DataFrame(_rows))
```

```{python}
#| label: overview-period

_period = con.execute("""
    SELECT MIN(created_at) AS oldest, MAX(created_at) AS newest, MAX(updated_at) AS last_update
    FROM conversations
""").df()
_oldest = _period["oldest"].iloc[0]
_newest = _period["newest"].iloc[0]
_last = _period["last_update"].iloc[0]

_meta_rows = [
    {"Campo": "Subset", "Valor": SUBSET_TITLE},
    {"Campo": "Sources incluidas", "Valor": ", ".join(SOURCES_FILTER) if SOURCES_FILTER else "todas (10)"},
    {"Campo": "Periodo de criacao", "Valor": f"{_oldest:%Y-%m-%d} → {_newest:%Y-%m-%d}" if pd.notna(_oldest) else "—"},
    {"Campo": "Ultima atualizacao", "Valor": f"{_last:%Y-%m-%d %H:%M}" if pd.notna(_last) else "—"},
]
show_df(pd.DataFrame(_meta_rows))
```

# 1. Comparativo plataforma × métricas

Tabela pivot: cada linha eh uma plataforma, cada coluna eh uma metrica.
Vista de uma vez "quem tem o que".

```{python}
#| label: comparative-table

_comp = con.execute("""
    SELECT
        source AS plataforma,
        COUNT(*) AS convs,
        SUM(message_count) AS msgs_total,
        ROUND(AVG(message_count), 1) AS avg_msgs,
        SUM(is_preserved_missing::INT) AS preserved,
        SUM(is_pinned::INT) AS pinned,
        MIN(created_at)::DATE AS oldest,
        MAX(created_at)::DATE AS newest
    FROM conversations
    GROUP BY source
    ORDER BY convs DESC
""").df()
show_df(_comp)
```

```{python}
#| label: tools-by-source

_tools = con.execute("""
    SELECT source AS plataforma,
        COUNT(*) AS tool_events,
        COUNT(DISTINCT tool_name) AS unique_tools,
        SUM(CASE WHEN success THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) AS sucesso,
        SUM(CASE WHEN success = false THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) AS erro
    FROM tool_events
    GROUP BY source
    ORDER BY tool_events DESC
""").df()
show_df(_tools)
```

# 2. Distribuição temporal

## 2.1 Conversas criadas por mês (stacked por plataforma)

```{python}
#| label: timeline-stacked

_tl = con.execute("""
    SELECT strftime(created_at, '%Y-%m') AS mes,
        source AS plataforma,
        COUNT(*) AS n
    FROM conversations
    WHERE created_at IS NOT NULL
    GROUP BY mes, source
    ORDER BY mes, source
""").df()

if len(_tl):
    import plotly.graph_objects as go
    pivot = _tl.pivot(index="mes", columns="plataforma", values="n").fillna(0)
    fig = go.Figure()
    for col in pivot.columns:
        fig.add_trace(go.Bar(x=pivot.index, y=pivot[col],
                              name=col, marker_color=SOURCE_COLORS.get(col, MUTED)))
    fig.update_layout(
        barmode="stack", title="Conversas criadas por mes (stacked por plataforma)",
        height=400, template="plotly_white",
        xaxis=dict(type="category"),
        margin=dict(t=50, b=80, l=40, r=20),
        legend=dict(orientation="h", y=-0.25),
    )
    fig.show()
```

## 2.2 Crescimento acumulado por plataforma

```{python}
#| label: cumulative-by-source

_cum = con.execute("""
    SELECT strftime(created_at, '%Y-%m') AS mes,
        source AS plataforma,
        COUNT(*) AS n
    FROM conversations
    WHERE created_at IS NOT NULL
    GROUP BY mes, source
    ORDER BY mes, source
""").df()

if len(_cum):
    import plotly.graph_objects as go
    fig = go.Figure()
    for src in _cum["plataforma"].unique():
        sub = _cum[_cum["plataforma"] == src].sort_values("mes")
        cum = sub["n"].cumsum()
        fig.add_trace(go.Scatter(
            x=sub["mes"], y=cum, mode="lines+markers", name=src,
            line=dict(color=SOURCE_COLORS.get(src, MUTED), width=2),
        ))
    fig.update_layout(
        title="Crescimento acumulado por plataforma",
        height=400, template="plotly_white",
        xaxis=dict(type="category", title="Mes"),
        yaxis=dict(title="Convs acumuladas"),
        margin=dict(t=50, b=40, l=40, r=20),
    )
    fig.show()
```

## 2.3 Activity heatmap (hora × dia, todas as fontes)

```{python}
#| label: heatmap-cross

_hm = con.execute("""
    SELECT EXTRACT(isodow FROM created_at) AS dow,
        EXTRACT(hour FROM created_at) AS hour,
        COUNT(*) AS n
    FROM conversations WHERE created_at IS NOT NULL
    GROUP BY dow, hour
""").df()

if len(_hm):
    import plotly.graph_objects as go
    pivot = _hm.pivot(index="dow", columns="hour", values="n").fillna(0)
    pivot = pivot.reindex(range(1, 8))
    days = ["Seg","Ter","Qua","Qui","Sex","Sab","Dom"]
    fig = go.Figure(go.Heatmap(
        z=pivot.values, x=list(pivot.columns), y=days,
        colorscale=[[0, "#ffffff"], [1, "#1f2937"]],
    ))
    fig.update_layout(
        title="Atividade — hora x dia (todas as plataformas)",
        height=300, template="plotly_white",
        xaxis=dict(title="Hora", dtick=2),
        margin=dict(t=50, b=40, l=60, r=20),
    )
    fig.show()
```

# 3. Modelos cross-platform

## 3.1 Top 20 modelos (com badge de source)

```{python}
#| label: top-models-cross

_tm = con.execute("""
    SELECT model, source AS plataforma, COUNT(*) AS n
    FROM conversations WHERE model IS NOT NULL
    GROUP BY model, source
    ORDER BY n DESC LIMIT 20
""").df()
show_df(_tm)
```

## 3.2 Heatmap modelo × plataforma (top 30 modelos)

```{python}
#| label: model-platform-heat

_mph = con.execute("""
    WITH top_models AS (
        SELECT model FROM conversations WHERE model IS NOT NULL
        GROUP BY model ORDER BY COUNT(*) DESC LIMIT 30
    )
    SELECT model, source AS plataforma, COUNT(*) AS n
    FROM conversations
    WHERE model IN (SELECT model FROM top_models)
    GROUP BY model, source
""").df()

if len(_mph):
    import plotly.graph_objects as go
    pivot = _mph.pivot(index="model", columns="plataforma", values="n").fillna(0)
    fig = go.Figure(go.Heatmap(
        z=pivot.values, x=list(pivot.columns), y=list(pivot.index),
        colorscale=[[0, "#ffffff"], [1, "#1f2937"]],
        text=pivot.values, texttemplate="%{text:.0f}",
    ))
    fig.update_layout(
        title="Distribuicao de uso: modelo × plataforma",
        height=600, template="plotly_white",
        margin=dict(t=50, b=40, l=140, r=20),
    )
    fig.show()
```

# 4. Capture method (proveniência do dado)

Distingue dado capturado pelo extractor automatico vs importado via parsers
manuais (clippings_obsidian, copypaste_web, terminal_claude_code,
legacy_notebooklm).

```{python}
#| label: capture-method-cross

if has_col(con, "conversations", "capture_method"):
    _cm = con.execute("""
        SELECT
            COALESCE(capture_method, 'extractor') AS method,
            source AS plataforma,
            COUNT(*) AS n
        FROM conversations
        GROUP BY method, source
        ORDER BY method, n DESC
    """).df()
    show_df(_cm)

    import plotly.graph_objects as go
    pivot = _cm.pivot(index="method", columns="plataforma", values="n").fillna(0)
    fig = go.Figure()
    for col in pivot.columns:
        fig.add_trace(go.Bar(x=pivot.index, y=pivot[col],
                              name=col, marker_color=SOURCE_COLORS.get(col, MUTED)))
    fig.update_layout(
        barmode="stack", title="Conversas por capture_method (stacked por plataforma)",
        height=400, template="plotly_white",
        margin=dict(t=50, b=80, l=40, r=20),
        legend=dict(orientation="h", y=-0.25),
    )
    fig.show()
else:
    show_md("> `capture_method` ausente nas views (todos extractor).")
```

# 5. Tool events cross-platform

## 5.1 Top 20 tools usados

```{python}
#| label: top-tools-cross

if table_count(con, "tool_events") > 0:
    _tt = con.execute("""
        SELECT tool_name, source AS plataforma, COUNT(*) AS calls
        FROM tool_events
        WHERE tool_name IS NOT NULL AND tool_name != ''
        GROUP BY tool_name, source
        ORDER BY calls DESC LIMIT 20
    """).df()
    show_df(_tt)
```

## 5.2 Tools por categoria (event_type) cross

```{python}
#| label: events-by-type-cross

if table_count(con, "tool_events") > 0:
    _et = con.execute("""
        SELECT event_type, source AS plataforma, COUNT(*) AS n
        FROM tool_events
        GROUP BY event_type, source
        ORDER BY n DESC
    """).df()

    import plotly.graph_objects as go
    pivot = _et.pivot(index="event_type", columns="plataforma", values="n").fillna(0)
    fig = go.Figure()
    for col in pivot.columns:
        fig.add_trace(go.Bar(x=pivot.index, y=pivot[col],
                              name=col, marker_color=SOURCE_COLORS.get(col, MUTED)))
    fig.update_layout(
        barmode="stack", title="ToolEvents por event_type (stacked por plataforma)",
        height=400, template="plotly_white",
        margin=dict(t=50, b=80, l=40, r=20),
        legend=dict(orientation="h", y=-0.25),
    )
    fig.show()
```

## 5.3 Success rate (CLIs)

```{python}
#| label: success-rate-cross

if has_col(con, "tool_events", "success"):
    _sr = con.execute("""
        SELECT source AS plataforma,
            SUM(CASE WHEN success THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) AS sucesso,
            SUM(CASE WHEN success = false THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) AS erro,
            SUM(CASE WHEN success IS NULL THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) AS desconhecido,
            COUNT(*) AS total
        FROM tool_events
        GROUP BY source
        HAVING SUM(CASE WHEN success IS NOT NULL THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) > 0
        ORDER BY total DESC
    """).df()
    if len(_sr):
        show_df(_sr)
    else:
        show_md("> Nenhuma plataforma neste subset registra success em tool_events.")
```

# 6. Word counts cross-platform

```{python}
#| label: words-cross

_wc = con.execute("""
    SELECT source AS plataforma, role,
        ROUND(AVG(word_count), 0)::INT AS avg_words,
        MEDIAN(word_count)::INT AS median_words,
        MAX(word_count) AS max_words,
        SUM(word_count) AS total_words
    FROM messages
    WHERE NOT is_hidden AND word_count > 0
    GROUP BY source, role
    ORDER BY source, role
""").df()
show_df(_wc)
```

# 7. Preservation e estados especiais

## 7.1 Preserved missing global

Convs ativas no servidor vs preservadas localmente (sumiram do servidor).

```{python}
#| label: preservation-cross

_pres = con.execute("""
    SELECT source AS plataforma,
        SUM(is_preserved_missing::INT) AS preserved,
        COUNT(*) AS total,
        ROUND(SUM(is_preserved_missing::INT) * 100.0 / NULLIF(COUNT(*),0), 1) AS pct
    FROM conversations
    GROUP BY source
    HAVING SUM(is_preserved_missing::INT) > 0
    ORDER BY preserved DESC
""").df()
if len(_pres):
    show_df(_pres)
else:
    show_md("> Zero convs preservadas (deletadas do servidor) neste subset.")
```

## 7.2 Pinned / Archived / Temporary

```{python}
#| label: states-cross

_st = con.execute("""
    SELECT source AS plataforma,
        SUM(is_pinned::INT) AS pinned,
        SUM(is_archived::INT) AS archived,
        SUM(is_temporary::INT) AS temporary,
        COUNT(*) AS total
    FROM conversations
    GROUP BY source
    HAVING SUM(is_pinned::INT) + SUM(is_archived::INT) + SUM(is_temporary::INT) > 0
    ORDER BY pinned DESC, archived DESC
""").df()
if len(_st):
    show_df(_st)
else:
    show_md("> Nenhuma plataforma deste subset registra pin/archive/temporary.")
```

# 8. Lifetime das conversas

`updated_at - created_at`. Distingue one-shot (< 1 dia) de threads que
viraram projeto (> 7 dias).

```{python}
#| label: lifetime-cross

_lf = con.execute("""
    WITH lt AS (
        SELECT source, EXTRACT(epoch FROM updated_at - created_at) / 86400 AS days
        FROM conversations
        WHERE updated_at IS NOT NULL AND created_at IS NOT NULL
    )
    SELECT source AS plataforma,
        CASE
            WHEN days < 0.04167 THEN '< 1h'
            WHEN days < 1 THEN '1h-1dia'
            WHEN days < 7 THEN '1-7 dias'
            WHEN days < 30 THEN '7-30 dias'
            WHEN days < 90 THEN '30-90 dias'
            ELSE '> 90 dias'
        END AS bin,
        COUNT(*) AS n
    FROM lt GROUP BY source, bin
""").df()

if len(_lf):
    _order = ['< 1h','1h-1dia','1-7 dias','7-30 dias','30-90 dias','> 90 dias']
    _lf['bin'] = pd.Categorical(_lf['bin'], categories=_order, ordered=True)
    _lf = _lf.sort_values(['bin', 'plataforma'])

    import plotly.graph_objects as go
    pivot = _lf.pivot(index="bin", columns="plataforma", values="n").fillna(0)
    pivot = pivot.reindex(_order)
    fig = go.Figure()
    for col in pivot.columns:
        fig.add_trace(go.Bar(x=pivot.index.astype(str), y=pivot[col],
                              name=col, marker_color=SOURCE_COLORS.get(col, MUTED)))
    fig.update_layout(
        barmode="stack", title="Lifetime das convs (stacked por plataforma)",
        height=400, template="plotly_white",
        margin=dict(t=50, b=80, l=40, r=20),
        legend=dict(orientation="h", y=-0.25),
    )
    fig.show()
```

# 9. Tabela completa cross-platform filtrável

```{python}
#| label: full-table-cross
#| column: page

from itables import show as itable_show

_full = con.execute("""
    SELECT
        source AS plataforma,
        substr(conversation_id, 1, 8) AS conv_id,
        title,
        message_count AS msgs,
        model,
        project,
        strftime(created_at, '%Y-%m-%d') AS created,
        is_preserved_missing AS preserved,
        is_pinned AS pinned
    FROM conversations
    ORDER BY created_at DESC
""").df()

itable_show(
    _full,
    paging=True, searching=True, ordering=True, info=True,
    lengthMenu=[10, 25, 50, 100],
    classes="display compact",
)
```
